title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, list/pull/delete models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to plug Ollama models into production-grade RAG & agent pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + SentenceTransformers.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF chat, function calling, voice chat, fine-tuning, CI/CD examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop app (Rust backend + React frontend) for chatting with Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that proxies user messages to Ollama and streams back responses in threads.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers and run model tests.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and full API coverage.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with Ollama” pane and can summarize selected notes.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop & other MCP clients.
